title: Q&A Pair
description: A question a shopper might ask about a product, paired with the answer. Q&A pairs front-load common decision-driving questions so an agent can answer in-line without re-querying.

question.description: The question, phrased as a shopper would naturally ask it.

answer.description: Direct, self-contained answer. SHOULD NOT require the shopper to consult other product fields to make sense.

intent.description: Open intent label naming the decision context the question maps to. Open vocabulary; clients MUST tolerate unknown values.

source.description: Categorical origin of the Q&A pair. Agents may weight trust by source. Open vocabulary; clients MUST tolerate unknown values.
